Countless interpretations these passages have been offered, going pretend though have definitive interpretation either.
However, believe have something worthwhile offer, namely view which endorses teaching prophets, well necessary change "transfiguration" Prophets, speak) which must take place when "heaven earth" pass away.
first, must attempt answer obvious question which likely would have crossed minds Jesus' first century Jewish audience.
would anyone Israel think that Jesus came abolish Prophets?
Jesus come teach opposition "the Law" Prophets God?
then, what Jesus mean "fulfill"?
order answer this question, let's take quick tour through Matthew's this very word, "fulfill," order used throughout this Gospel.
Notice that according Matthew's consistent this term "fulfill", always occurs alongside citations from Testament Scriptures.
Taking that into account, along with it's more straight-forward literal meaning "fill full", obvious interpretation what Jesus meant embody what foreshadowed Prophets, thereby "filling full" what lacking them.
"The Law" "The Prophets" find clear illustrations God's holiness, loyal-love, righteous indignation, mercy, goodness, long-suffering, patience, kindness.
single Israelite, even generation Israel collectively, ever typify that reality?
Even cursory glance through Scripture will show that answer clearly 'No'.
Israel given Prophets, every individual Israelite even Israel collectively lacking something significant which needed filled full.
realize that many Christians don't accept this viewing Prophets.
please bear with hear out.
What Israel lacking, which Prophets could fill full?
could also ask, what were Prophets lacking?
answer actually much more simple than what ordinarily meets eye.
Both people Israel, Prophets they received were lacking power raise dead grant eternal life immortality 6:16; 1:10; 15:53-54; 2:7).
Jesus came accomplish that, once time, even those righteous saints already died (Heb.
11:1-12:2).
order filling full what they were lacking according terms God's spoken through prophets.
prophets functioned pedagogy death, with limited access into Divine presence.
Even itself instructed Israel about inevitable "time reformation" which would result direct access Divine presence without fear death (Heb.
2:14-15; 9:8-10).
long "first tent" (the Holy Place) still standing, Holy Spirit indicating that into Holy places, where Christ seated right hand Father, opened living dead.
have indicated elsewhere academic paper, book Revelation teaches that after definitive covenant administration, with destruction Jerusalem temple A.D., that access into Holy places opened all, saints have died Christ ascend thrones, they each given authority over nations participate with Jesus making things new.
Only incarnation, death, resurrection, ascension, vindication could open that into heavenly realities eternal life with (Heb 8:1-5).
only temple Jesus' Body have destroyed, Covenant temple it's whole system administration needed destroyed along with order Covenant kingdom advance throughout world, uniting heaven earth together Church thereby colonizing earth with life heaven.
then, secondary sense, Prophets were only lacking power destroy power death, they were also lacking their promised Messiah, incarnate God, alone could accomplish that cosmic task.
This sentence admits twofold meaning.
...By saying that come destroy Law, fulfill says that going make complete adding what lacks that going observe doing what contains.
...He does destroy what found when supplies what lacked; contrary, strengthens giving completeness.
...For, when observing what been added sake completeness, more surely observing what been previously established foundation.
Accordingly, cannot said that Jesus came usefulness God's what prophets taught.
Indeed, very opposite seems case.
Yet, mentioned beginning this post, Jesus only endorsing usefulness God's teaching prophets.
also teaching that there will come time when "heaven earth" will pass away, when that occurs there must necessary change "transfiguration" Prophets, speak).
next post will bring clarity about when that time would what that implies Christians today.
Here's teaser though: That time future.
first "Heaven earth" already passed away.
